findings.message: `APP_WIDGET_API_URL` is interpolated as `${APP_WIDGET_API_URL}` in base.yml but is not declared in `.env.example`. With no declaration, the interpolation resolves to empty in every environment that composes base.yml (dev/test), breaking the env-var parity contract that every `${APP_*}` referenced by an overlay must have a corresponding entry in `.env.example`.
findings.suggestion: Add `APP_WIDGET_API_URL=` (with an appropriate default/placeholder) to `.env.example` so the variable is declared and documented, matching the compose interpolation.

With no declaration, the interpolation resolves to empty in every environment that composes base.yml (dev/test), breaking the env-var parity contract that every `${APP_*}` referenced by an overlay must have a corresponding entry in `.env.example`.","suggestion":"Add `APP_WIDGET_API_URL=` (with an appropriate default/placeholder) to `.env.example` so the variable is declared and documented, matching the compose interpolation."}]
